name: Heart of Palm Rolls for Lumpia from _eafc_
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Small shrimp or prawns (shelled and sliced)
1 lb Boiled pork, cut into narrow strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the hearts of palm to a boil for 5 minutes; drain.
2. In a pan, sauté minced garlic and chopped onion in lard until they are softened.
3. Add fish sauce and shrimp to the pan, continuing to sauté for 3 minutes.
4. Incorporate pork strips and crabmeat, heating through completely. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Add the cooked hearts of palm, cooking for an additional 3 to 4 minutes.
6. Place a lettuce leaf on each lumpia wrapper.
7. Fill generously with the seasoned heart of palm mixture.
8. Roll up tightly and serve with hot sauce.
